parsed_review.summary: PASS. CP00-943 is a descriptor-only HRX embedded People/HR Evidence closeout pack (10 units: 1 LeaveFixture tail subphase + 9 RiskFixture foundation subphases; range RP30.P05.M09.S08-RP30.P05.M10.S09; risk class A). The descriptor-verified claim (hrx_leave_risk_fixture_tail_bridge_descriptor_verified) is fully supported by code-resident implementation (registry.js HRX_CP943_PACK_BINDING/REQUIREMENTS/REQUIRED_SECTION_ROWS, createHrxCp943LeaveRiskFixtureTailBridgeDescriptor, case set, Hermes/Claude packets, projection wiring with CP943 as latest), comprehensive validators (validators.js coverage + descriptor + contract checks that force every runtime/write/real-data/permission-bypass/score-calculation flag to false), three CP943 tests in test/model.test.js (one validating the on-disk contract), the regenerated contracts/hrx-people-contract.json (latest_pack CP00-943, descriptor HrxCp943LeaveRiskFixtureTailBridgeDescriptor, validation.valid=true, no-write attestation all-false), the validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs chain (CP897->CP943 bindings, coverage, descriptor, contract), and the README CP00-943 entry. All no-runtime/no-write/no-real-data/no-credential/no-score-calculation boundaries hold; the HRX modules contain no writeFile/exec/network/process.env. Hermes is deterministic control-plane only (emits_runtime_receipt=false, deterministic_only=true), not product runtime; Claude remains read-only with claude_is_final_approval=false and promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false. production_ready and runtime_ready are correctly held false (no gate weakening); runtime opening is deferred to CP00-944/RP30.P06.M00.S01 under human approval. The pack does not claim runtime or enterprise trust, so this CP closeout goal is not blocked by the expected human/enterprise-trust authority boundary. Unrelated dirty/untracked files (progress-control-room, workbook/*, docs/ldip-integration/claude-review-results/c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json) are correctly recorded as out of pack scope. No prior malformed/auth-failed review evidence to reject; readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0). No P0/P1/P2 findings; one P3 informational note on expected post-receipt finalization.

findings.title: Closeout-state artifacts correctly in pre-receipt PENDING state; finalize deterministically after this PASS while keeping production_ready/runtime_ready false
findings.details: All CP00-943 closeout-state artifacts are in their expected pre-receipt state awaiting this hardened review: manifest.json status=in_progress with pack_level_claude_review.status=pending_hardened_review, verdict=null, and empty valid_review_receipts; construction-inspection.json verdict=PENDING with pack_production_ready=false and hrx_leave_risk_fixture_tail_bridge_descriptor_verified=false; adjudication.md PENDING; claude-review-result.json status=pending_hardened_review; command-evidence.json status=pending_final_validation with hermes_gate=pending (node --check, node --test, npm run rp30:hrx:validate all exit_code 0). This is not a defect - these fields are designed to be finalized by the deterministic closer after a valid review receipt. The descriptor-only substance is independently corroborated by registry.js (CP943 binding/requirements/descriptor/case-set/projection), validators.js (coverage + descriptor + contract validation enforcing all boundary flags false), test/model.test.js (3 CP943 tests including on-disk contract projection), contracts/hrx-people-contract.json (latest_pack CP00-943, validation.valid=true, no-write attestation all-false), and scripts/validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs.
findings.recommendation: Proceed to deterministic closer finalization. The closer (not Claude) must record this review receipt and may set hrx_leave_risk_fixture_tail_bridge_descriptor_verified=true while keeping production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, and descriptor_only=true. Do not let this PASS or local validation imply runtime opening or enterprise trust; runtime opening remains deferred to CP00-944/RP30.P06.M00.S01 under human final approval. Human/enterprise-trust approval remains outside this receipt.
